content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Digital Treasury Pty Ltd: Senior SEO Specialist Anywhere in the World Australian Capital Territory Sales and Marketing Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5800/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Australia <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.digitaltreasury.com.au/">https://www.digitaltreasury.com.au/</a> </p> <h2>About the Role</h2> <p>As our Senior SEO Specialist, you'll own and grow SEO campaigns from strategy through to implementation. You'll work closely with our developers, writers, and account managers to improve organic visibility, strengthen authority, and build a predictable pipeline of qualified traffic for our clients</p> <p>This role is ideal for someone who is analytical, technically strong, proactive, and passionate about staying ahead of the dynamic AI &amp; search landscape.</p> <h2>Key Responsibilities</h2> <ul> <li> <p>Develop and own SEO strategy across multiple client accounts.</p> </li> <li> <p>Run comprehensive technical audits to identify crawlability, indexing, and site architecture gaps.</p> </li> <li> <p>Implement structured data, manage sitemaps and redirects, and troubleshoot rendering, canonicalisation, and crawl budget problems.</p> </li> <li> <p>Research keywords by intent and funnel stage, and work with the content team to close competitor and content gaps.</p> </li> <li> <p>Translate findings into actionable recommendations, roadmaps, content calendars, and sprint priorities for each client.</p> </li> <li> <p>Build authority through targeted link-building through outreach, guest posts, and partnerships.</p> </li> <li> <p>Optimise on-page SEO including metadata, internal linking, headings, and content structure.</p> </li> <li> <p>Analyse and optimise performance using GA4, GSC, Ahrefs, and similar tools, and manage reporting dashboards.</p> </li> <li> <p>Perform log file analysis where required.</p> </li> <li> <p>Work closely with developers to ensure technical recommendations are implemented correctly.</p> </li> <li> <p>Mentor junior SEO team members and provide technical guidance.</p> </li> <li> <p>Stay curious and keep up with algorithm changes, AI search trends, and SEO best practices.</p> </li> </ul> <h2>Skills &amp; Experience</h2> <h3>Required</h3> <ul> <li> <p>4+ years of SEO experience.</p> </li> <li> <p>Excellent understanding of Google Search Console and Google Analytics 4.</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience using tools such as Ahrefs, SEMrush, Screaming Frog, Sitebulb or similar.</p> </li> <li> <p>Solid understanding of web fundamentals (HTML, CSS, JavaScript) and how they impact SEO.</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience with WordPress and other CMS platforms.</p> </li> <li> <p>Comfortable in managing multiple accounts across different industries in a fast-moving agency environment.</p> </li> <li> <p>Excellent written and verbal communication in English</p> </li> </ul> <h3>Bonus</h3> <ul> <li> <p>Hands-on experience with Webflow and Google Tag Manager.</p> </li> <li> <p>Skilled in building and interpreting Looker Studio dashboards.</p> </li> <li> <p>Proven track record in local SEO campaigns.</p> </li> <li> <p>Prior Digital Marketing agency experience.</p> </li> </ul> <h2>What You'll Get</h2> <ul> <li> <p>Fully remote position with flexible working arrangements.</p> </li> <li> <p>Opportunity to work with diverse Australian businesses.</p> </li> <li> <p>High autonomy, with real support for your career growth.</p> </li> <li> <p>Exposure to challenging technical SEO projects.</p> </li> <li> <p>Access to a full suite of paid SEO and AI tools and workflows.</p> </li> <li> <p>Opportunity to lead an SEO team.</p> </li> </ul> <h2>How to Apply</h2> <p>Submit the following:</p> <ul> <li> <p>Your resume</p> </li> <li> <p>A short cover letter</p> </li> <li> <p>Examples of SEO campaigns or websites you've worked on</p> </li> <li> <p>Any case studies or measurable results you can share</p> </li> </ul> <p>If you're passionate about SEO and want to work with a growing Australian digital agency, we'd love to hear from you.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/digital-treasury-pty-ltd-senior-seo-specialist">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/digital-treasury-pty-ltd-senior-seo-specialist</a></p> Tue, 14 Jul Brazil, 🇨🇱 Chile, 🇨🇴 Colombia, 🇨🇷 Costa Rica, 🇲🇽 Mexico, and 🇺🇾 Uruguay California All Other Remote Contract <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5797/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.toptal.com/">https://www.toptal.com/</a> </p> <h2>About the Role</h2> <p>We're looking for Senior Rust Engineers to take real ownership of a high-performance, production backend. You'll be working on mission-critical systems where performance, security, and reliability aren't nice-to-haves — they're the job. Whether the work is hardening core services for a cybersecurity product or extending a Rust-based backend that powers a cross-platform application, this role is for someone who can navigate complex, unfamiliar codebases quickly and start shipping production-ready code fast.</p> <h2>What You'll Do</h2> <ul> <li> <p>Build, optimize, and maintain high-performance backend services in Rust</p> </li> <li> <p>Take ownership of core backend architecture, including remediating vulnerabilities and improving CI/CD workflows</p> </li> <li> <p>Interface with PostgreSQL for complex data management, persistence, and schema-oriented design</p> </li> <li> <p>Design and work with schema-oriented service patterns (e.g., gRPC) where applicable</p> </li> <li> <p>Deploy and maintain services on AWS</p> </li> <li> <p>Jump into an existing, unfamiliar codebase and reach full productivity within the first 1–2 weeks</p> </li> <li> <p>Submit clean, high-quality code that holds up to rigorous review and peer scrutiny</p> </li> <li&
